# Google Cloud Security

## RSA 2026

Google Cloud Security is a Platinum Sponsor at RSA Conference 2026. Their booth is located in the **North Hall, booth #N-6062** at the Moscone Center. They also have a presence at the Marriott Marquis.

Key themes from Google Security at RSAC 2026 include supercharging agentic AI defense with frontline threat intelligence, securing the entire AI life cycle, and delivering a unified defense platform. [cite: 1,
